title: vulpia microstachys var. ciliata
intro: Vulpia microstachys var. ciliata, also known as small fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Vulpia microstachys var. ciliata include its ability to reduce coughs, ease congestion, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in creams and ointments to promote healing and relaxation.
